# Prompt Builder Lessons

- Turn one-off tasks into prompts only when they will repeat.
- Keep prompt scope narrow and output rules explicit.
- Prefer slightly modified public prompts when a good public pattern exists.
- When a public pattern exists, keep its section ordering and validation shape, but rewrite the content so it matches the local repo and task.
- Prefer clear sections, delimiters, and output contracts over generic prose.
- Save useful prompt patterns to the shared lessons file.
